payload.diagram_title: My production Rust app just crashed 🚨.
quality_notes: Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 Rust Servo Integration

My production Rust app just crashed 🚨.
I was wrong to think compiling was the bottleneck.

1️⃣ Rust builds are slow

2️⃣ Servo is the fix

I finally understood that Servo's parallelized compiler is key 🔑.

Best practices include optimizing dependencies and measuring performance 📊.

Common mistakes like incorrect config can still happen 🤦‍♂️.

💬 Which part of the Servo integration is most important to you?
#Rust #Servo #PerformanceOptimization #CompilerDesign #ParallelProcessing #SoftwareEngineering
